curriculumRef.value: NCE Chemistry Year 1 — CHE 111 General Chemistry

title: Two Blocks Share the Same Slot Id

blocks.title: First block

citations.excerpt: Elements in the same group possess the same number of valence electrons and therefore exhibit similar chemical characteristics.

blocks.body: Elements in the same group share valence-electron counts.

blocks.title: Second block reuses blk-001 — slot ids must be unique (AD-23)
blocks.body: Duplicate slot id: citations, view marks, patches, and progress rows would attach ambiguously.
